summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitBeats public playlists and download features. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend SharedPlaylistPage works correctly on desktop and mobile. PlaylistDetailView shows download and share buttons. Spotify search regression test passed.
passed_tests: GET /api/public/playlists/{id} returns public playlist without auth
GET /api/public/playlists/{id}/items returns items for public playlist without auth
GET /api/playlists/{id}/download returns 400 when no local mixes (Spotify-only playlist)
Spotify search still works (regression check) - 20 tracks returned
Adding Spotify items to playlist still works (regression check)
Frontend /shared/{playlist_id} page renders playlist info, tracks, and CTA without login
Frontend /shared/{playlist_id} shows FitBeats logo, 'Iniciar sesión' and 'Registrarse gratis' buttons
Mobile view (390px) of shared playlist page works correctly
Share button copies /shared/{id} URL format (toast shown 'copiado')
seed_data_creation: Used existing test playlist 'playlist_9ce625ab7be1' (Cardio Vibes 2026) with 2 Spotify tracks for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public playlist endpoints work without authentication. SharedPlaylistPage at /shared/{id} displays playlist info, tracks with Spotify indicators, and CTA buttons. Download endpoint returns 400 for Spotify-only playlists with message 'No hay mixes locales para descargar'. Share button copies URL in format /shared/{playlist_id}. All Spotify integration features from iteration_7 continue to work.
